Welcome to PMax Sentry

Dual-tier detection for Google Ads placements

1

Navigate to Placements

Go to Google Ads → Campaigns → Placements

2

Scan

Detect confirmed (red) and suspected (yellow) waste

3

Exclude

Review and exclude with one click
